primary_timeout_100.description: Primary provider fails 100 percent; backup should absorb traffic.
primary_timeout_100.expected_behavior: Primary opens quickly and backup handles nearly all successful traffic.

primary_flaky_50.description: Primary provider fails 50 percent; circuit should oscillate.
primary_flaky_50.expected_behavior: Primary intermittently fails, circuit opens at least once, fallback absorbs spillover.

cache_stale_candidate.description: Cache should keep safe FAQ hits but block date-sensitive false hits.
cache_stale_candidate.expected_behavior: Cache should serve safe repeats while blocking false hits on date-sensitive prompts.

all_healthy.description: Baseline where both providers are healthy.
all_healthy.expected_behavior: Requests stay on primary with no circuit openings or static fallbacks.

false_hit_examples: Summarize refund policy for 2026 deadline -> Summarize refund policy for 2024 deadline (0.7769)
Summarize refund policy for 2026 deadline -> Summarize refund policy for 2024 deadline (0.7769)
